repo.description: Claude Code plugin: capture geo-restricted web content (Israeli news, prices) via the user's own IP. Headless-first escalation ladder.

terms.context_snippet: Claude Code plugin for capturing web content **from the user's own machine** — so every request exits via the user's IP. Built for geo-restricted content (seeded with Israeli news + e-commerce) where hosted scrapers get blocked at the edge.
